category_sources: source_facts.description says GStreamer is a development framework for multimedia applications; official documentation calls it a multimedia framework for streaming media applications.
display_name_sources: Official GStreamer documentation and source_facts.homepage use the name GStreamer.
docs_sources: Official GStreamer documentation page contains API references, tutorials, application manual, plugin writer guide, FAQ, and command-line tools documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gstreamer; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says multimedia application framework; official documentation describes GStreamer as a framework for streaming media applications.
